files.notes: Clear split between Lesson II (Genealogy) and Lesson III (Art). The genealogy lesson ends with discussion of temple work limitations, and the art lesson begins with 'October ART Lesson III.' The art lesson covers John Singer Sargent and George De Forest Brush.
